title: Liberty Garden [Cobblemon]
description: Unleash the power of victory as Victini returns to the world of blocks, bringing good fortune to those who find it.
body:
![Liberty Garden Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c318f4c300d6fd545a546f9e6329e77d1e7361f8.png)
So after playing Cobblemon for about a year and using multiple addons I noticed one thing - there is no available model that quite _satisfied_ my expectations for my favorite Pokémon - Victini! With help from [RedRibbon](https://modrinth.com/user/RedRibbonz), [Coolrex](https://modrinth.com/user/Coolrex) & Aris - who aided me with this cutie - this addon aims to finally change that!
![Included Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0afdf5bbb9ec08cebc990a165fbcf1e98d86ad4e.png)
Sleeping & faint animations Unique standing & battle animations Visually shows held items in its tiny hand Little quirks like blinking or cute tail wiggling Supports all 10 wearable items from Cobblemon Battle animations for his physical and special attacks Unique animations/particles for its signature move V-Create Full support for Mega Showdown _(Tera Hats, Dynamax Clouds)_ Sometimes randomly strikes a very victorious pose Can wear cosmetics like Black & Wise Glasses Naturally able to fly around the entire world Sometimes randomly jumpes for joy Unique cries & sounds
![Future Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e1d5bc3a378e9666a93a0c9b588789d2c1615dd.png)
Animation & particles for its second signature move searing shot Some custom skins/outfits for the new cosmetics system Anything you guys suggest _(that would make sense)_
![Spawn Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12e791666d6df60a8b32c3d8752c9e654fe39268.png)

Victini is an Ultra-Rare spawn in all Savanna, Volcanic and Island biomes [Here's](https://wiki.cobblemon.com/index.php/Pokémon/Spawning/Spawn_Definitions) a list of what each category of biomes includes Greatly reduced odds while it's raining or thundering Higher chance of spawning in the morning Can't spawn in/near villages **Note:** The addon automatically disables the random spawn ***if*** you have [Legendary Monuments](https://modrinth.com/mod/legendary-monuments) installed - since it already adds a structure to obtain Victini!
![Installation Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd4ac549f6483475f4a1d84bfa37d7a49e476fce.png)
Click for instructions! ### Singleplayer: **Put the .zip in `/saves/[WORLDNAME]/datapacks`** **Put the .zip in `/resourcepacks`** **Enable in game `ESC - Options - Resource Packs`** ### Servers: **Put the .zip in `/world/datapacks`** _Sometimes it's called myworld, or something similar, sometimes it has a name instead_ _If you're in doubt about the correct folder, consult your server providers guide on how to add datapacks_ **Every Player has to have the .zip installed as a `Resource Pack`** _Best option if for them to have it installed and enabled in their clients_ _It's possible to add them to server resources, but note that there have been issues with this for some cobblemon addons, so try whatever method suits you better_
![Licensing Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd797a08c45192e9477cb61e54c26b25c151762e.png)
If you have questions regarding usage/permissions on public servers, making skins, derivatives or really anything else, just hit me up on discord `@_lvnatic`_(just search for me on the Cobblemon or Mega Showdown discord you should be able to find me!)_
